name: Attribute edits on hero CTA
notes: Attribute edits on an existing element with static (non-reactive) attributes in the template. Empirical observation: SURVIVES without reinforcement — Vue's hydration accepts the SSR'd attribute values without reconciling, because the template has no :attr=expr bindings for href/data-ga-name. Reinforcement is the safety net for cases where the customer adds a reactive binding later.
